title: Riverbend Boot — Walnut
summary: Riverbend boot in walnut; built in United States for daily use.

content.text:
# Riverbend Boot — Walnut

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Riverbend Boot — Walnut is designed for the long haul, with footwear-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in United States.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
